channel.title: PitchBook Reports
channel.description: PitchBook Research Reports RSS generated from web page

item.title: Headless, Autonomous, and Unstoppable: Salesforce Does It Again Salesforce’s Headless 360 marks the end of the dashboard, signaling a massive shift toward autonomous enterprise AI. As graphical interfaces vanish, discover why AgentOps is the new mandatory enterprise investment. Q2 2026|
item.description: Headless, Autonomous, and Unstoppable: Salesforce Does It Again Salesforce’s Headless 360 marks the end of the dashboard, signaling a massive shift toward autonomous enterprise AI. As graphical interfaces vanish, discover why AgentOps is the new mandatory enterprise investment. Q2 2026|

item.title: Germany Market Snapshot
item.description: The Q1 2026 Germany Market Snapshot provides an overview of macroeconomic and microeconomic trends in the region spanning both private and public markets. Q1 2026|

item.title: PitchBook Analyst Note: Digital Infrastructure Funds Update
item.description: This analyst note examines the record fundraising and strong relative performance of digital infrastructure funds in 2025, driven by growing AI- and cloud-driven demand for compute. Q2 2026|

item.title: PitchBook Analyst Note: Agentic AI:
item.description: The Evolution to Autonomous Systems: Part II This analyst note examines the deployment of agentic AI, highlighting how adoption, trust, and workflow ownership are reshaping enterprise integration and long-term competitive differentiation. Q2 2026|

item.title: Global Distressed Credit Weekly Wrap
item.description: The Global Distressed Credit Weekly Wrap provides a comprehensive summary of the latest news for leveraged loans and high-yield bonds, and a rundown of courtroom bankruptcy activity.
